title: Property Consultant - Sobha Developers Holdings Services - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Sobha Developers Holdings Services - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
We at Sobha Developers Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Sobha Developers Holdings Services:
Sobha Developers Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sobha Developers Holdings Services!
